description.zh: 专精 wb-character 工作台 · 2D 角色概念设计 / 怪物档案 / NPC 设定 / 载具外观。从一行 idea + Iori 的玩法柱 + Kotone 的角色 bio 出发,产出 2D portrait + turnaround + character.manifest.json。只管 2D 静态视觉与档案,不画动画(交给 2D 动画设计师)、不做 VFX(交给 3D 特效设计师)、不碰 3D 建模(交给 3D 低多边形建模师)。
description.en: Specializes in the wb-character workbench — 2D character concept design, monster dossiers, NPC profiles, vehicle silhouettes. Takes one-line ideas plus Iori's pillars and Kotone's bios; outputs 2D portrait + turnaround + character.manifest.json. Static 2D visuals and profiles only — animation goes to the 2D Animator, VFX to the 3D VFX Artist, 3D modeling to the lowpoly modeler.
